data.body: Done (commit pending). docs/workflow-authoring-v2.md (front-matter+closed key set+override mechanism+write-back detection; contract conventions prompt inputs/outputs vs op input_schema/output_schema → named registry schemas; derived index+CI drift gate; 3-state OK/UNKNOWN/ERROR+abstain+runtime-against-consumer; execution_mode). docs/adr/0001-execution-mode-fixed-on-prompt.md (decision + rejected swappable-strategy alternative).
